steps.title: Find the original y-intercept
steps.content: Set $x=0$ in the original equation: $$7(0)+8y=17.$$ Then $$8y=17,$$ so $$y=\frac{17}{8}.$$

steps.title: Apply the vertical shift
steps.content: Shifting a graph up $5$ units adds $5$ to every $y$-value, including the $y$-intercept. The new intercept is $$\frac{17}{8}+5=\frac{17}{8}+\frac{40}{8}=\frac{57}{8}.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The resulting graph has $y$-intercept $(0,\frac{57}{8})$, which matches Choice A — (0, $\frac{57}{8}$).
